preReview.title: Houston Dynamo v Los Angeles FC: 'The next game can't come quickly enough' – Olsen
preReview.description: Houston Dynamo are yet to win in MLS this season, and host Los Angeles FC next as they big to get their first three points on the board.

QAData.answer: Houston Dynamo FC won 1–0 over Los Angeles FC on Sun, 06 Apr 2025 00:30:00 GMT.
